title: T-029 — Cycle-count quick adjustment service (P1 stub)
prompt:
# T-029 — Cycle-count quick adjustment service

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §8.8 (FR-WH-037), V-WH-MOV-007.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`cycleCountQuickAdjust(lpId, actualQty, reasonCode, reasonText?)` reusing T-028 threshold logic but tagged for cycle-count provenance.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/cycle-count-quick-adj.ts`. Wraps `adjustLp` with reason_code restricted to ('counting_error','damage','other') and tags `context_jsonb.source='cycle_count_p1_stub'` on stock_moves and lp_genealogy. RBAC: Manager only per UX trigger. Full WH-E14 cycle counts deferred to P2.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/cycle-count-quick-adj.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/cycle-count-quick-adj.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Manager calls cycleCountQuickAdjust with reason_code='counting_error', when service runs, then it dispatches to T-028 and tags context_jsonb.source='cycle_count_p1_stub'.
2. Given an Operator (no Manager role), when called, then it returns an RBAC error.
3. Given reason_code='damage' with delta 15%, when called, then movement_approvals row is created via T-028 threshold gate.

## Test strategy
- RED: cycle-count-quick-adj.test.ts covers Manager success, RBAC denial, threshold dispatch.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test cycle-count-quick-adj`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement full cycle count workflow (P2).
- Do not bypass T-028 threshold gate.
- Do not allow Operator role.

pipeline_inputs.description: P1 cycle-count quick adjustment service tagging stock_moves with cycle_count provenance; reuses T-028 threshold.
pipeline_inputs.details: Manager-only; reason_code subset; provenance tag in context_jsonb. Full WH-E14 deferred to P2.
